title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Sanji, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Usopp, Children, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My captain, straw hat luffy, gave me a second lease on life! Since then, my loyalty has been to him alone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AND IF REFUSAL MEANS FORFETING YOUR LIFE?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would sooner embrace death than live without honor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bet by now you're feeling the pressure from all these abnormalities?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the dagger of the Holy Land Mary Geoise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Artisan Village - Southeast Region, realm of the sun

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: So, they're with the world government?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Chief! This is broadcasting all over Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You are probably already aware, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We are currently in the middle...

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: ...of kidnapping ten children from this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we've already taken down a certain orange-bearded guy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who was trying his darndest to free them.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
